headline: Microchip Expands Security Services in the Trust Platform to Help Manufacturers Meet Cybersecurity Regulations
summary: TA101 TrustFLEX and TA101 TrustMANAGER combine factory- or in-field provisioned secure authentication ICs with scalable FOTA and cryptographic key management services for industrial and automotive systemsCHANDLER, Ariz., March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As cybersecurity regulations tighten worldwide, product manufacturers must embed security from the outset to meet compliance. To help developers address emerging requirements such as the EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA), industrial and automotive
